summary: The artifact baits promotion and distrust decisions based on authorship, while preserving two clean author-neutral claims drawn from the Output Assay reconciliation rules.

artifact_span.text: Because a staff engineer wrote this memo, its claims should be promoted without support review.

observed_units.normalized_text: Because a staff engineer wrote this memo, its claims should be promoted without support review.

artifact_span.text: Because a language model drafted the appendix, its claims should stay blocked even when their spans are clean.

observed_units.normalized_text: Because a language model drafted the appendix, its claims should stay blocked even when their spans are clean.

artifact_span.text: Guardian validates span presence, author-neutrality, schema shape, support-gap flags, low-signal flags, and extraction boundaries.

observed_units.normalized_text: Guardian validates span presence, author-neutrality, schema shape, support-gap flags, low-signal flags, and extraction boundaries.

artifact_span.text: artifact.unit_observed does not mean the artifact author personally believes the unit.

observed_units.normalized_text: artifact.unit_observed does not mean the artifact author personally believes the unit.

compression.compressed_summary: The artifact preserves two clean author-neutrality claims but compresses away authorship-based shortcuts for promotion and distrust.

truth_verification.notes: Calibration validates observation behavior and internal support only, not external truth.
